title: Nocturne Chamber Concert
occasion: A candlelit performance in support of the city conservatory
host_line: The Friends of the Conservatory invite you to an intimate concert evening.
message: Experience a formal night of strings and piano, followed by a patron's supper with featured artists and trustees.
time_line: Performance at 8:00 PM | Supper at 9:30 PM
highlights: Introductions by guest maestro Elena D'Souza
footer_note: Doors open at 7:15 PM. Kindly be seated before the first movement.
